summary: Wrote chapter 25 'The Stinger' — final chapter of Book 1. Dual POV, 2 scenes, 7 beats. Scene 1: Jaina tracks Frostmourne's accelerating pulse-sorting through prison stone, names the book's truth through the wall (being right alone was never enough — the partnership is what stopped Arthas), packages intelligence. Scene 2: Sylvanas faces Mal'Ganis in true Nathrezim form, learns the architecture survives Arthas's death, receives Kalar'shorel'anor farewell, cascades five disguised encounters into one huntable operative signature. Self-audit: killed cataloguing/geometry/taxonomy/register/assessment/filed violations, fixed negation chains, cut like-similes from 6 to 3, varied 15+ The-noun openers, removed abstract-noun locomotion, trimmed POV filters.
